name: Round Ruffle Floral Jacquard Pillow Purple/Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a decorative touch to your space with the Round Ruffle Floral Jacquard Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This round pillow is covered with floral print and ruffled sides for an amazing look. Made with a 100% cotton exterior and polyester filling, this woven pillow feels soft and comfortable as you rest on it. The hidden zipper helps create a finished look, while the removable cover allows easy maintenance.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
